inputs.label: Number of Nodes
inputs.businessContext: The number of nodes in the network. This version supports 3-node MST calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: The number of nodes in the network. This version supports 3-node MST calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ağdaki düğüm sayısı. Bu sürüm 3 düğümlü MST hesaplamasını destekler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Anzahl der Knoten im Netzwerk. Diese Version unterstützt die Berechnung des MST mit 3 Knoten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de nœuds dans le réseau. Cette version prend en charge le calcul MST à 3 nœuds.
businessContext_i18n.es: El número de nodos en la red. Esta versión admite cálculo de MST de 3 nodos.

inputs.label: Edge A-B Length
inputs.businessContext: Distance between node A and node B.

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance between node A and node B.
businessContext_i18n.tr: A düğümü ile B düğümü arasındaki mesafe.
businessContext_i18n.de: Abstand zwischen Knoten A und Knoten B.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance entre le nœud A et le nœud B.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia entre el nodo A y el nodo B.

inputs.label: Edge B-C Length
inputs.businessContext: Distance between node B and node C.

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance between node B and node C.
businessContext_i18n.tr: B düğümü ile C düğümü arasındaki mesafe.
businessContext_i18n.de: Abstand zwischen Knoten B und Knoten C.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance entre le nœud B et le nœud C.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia entre el nodo B y el nodo C.

inputs.label: Edge C-A Length
inputs.businessContext: Distance between node C and node A.

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance between node C and node A.
businessContext_i18n.tr: C düğümü ile A düğümü arasındaki mesafe.
businessContext_i18n.de: Abstand zwischen Knoten C und Knoten A.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance entre le nœud C et le nœud A.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia entre el nodo C y el nodo A.

inputs.label: Cost per Meter
inputs.businessContext: Cost per meter of cabling or piping for the network.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost per meter of cabling or piping for the network.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ağ için kablo veya boru döşemenin metre başına maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten pro Meter Verkabelung oder Verrohrung für das Netzwerk.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût par mètre de câblage ou de tuyauterie pour le réseau.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste por metro de cableado o tubería para la red.

inputs.label: Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplicative safety factor to account for contingencies.

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplicative safety factor to account for contingencies.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Öngörülemeyen durumlar için çarpımsal güvenlik faktörü.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de sécurité multiplicatif pour tenir compte des imprévus.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de seguridad multiplicativo para contingencias.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
